title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 760 至 1040 行，共 1441 行) ---
 760 | 
 761 |         # 3. 统计数据作为补充
 762 |         stats_parts = []
 763 |         stats_parts.append(f"压缩了 {len(messages)} 条消息")
 764 |         if files_changed:
 765 |             stats_parts.append(f"{len(files_changed)} 个文件变更")
 766 |         if errors_encountered:
 767 |             stats_parts.append(f"{len(errors_encountered)} 个错误")
 768 |         if tools_used:
 769 |             stats_parts.append(f"使用 {len(tools_used)} 种工具")
 770 | 
 771 |         summary_text = "\n".join(summary_parts + ["统计: " + "，".join(stats_parts)])
 772 | 
 773 |         # 如果没有提取到任何关键内容，使用简化版摘要
 774 |         if not summary_parts:
 775 |             summary_text = f"使用{strategy.value}策略压缩了 {len(messages)} 条消息（无关键内容提取）"
 776 | 
 777 |         # 🔥 新增：检测任务状态（优先使用真实 Plan 状态）
 778 |         task_status = "in_progress"  # 默认值
 779 | 
 780 |         # 🔥🔥🔥 关键修复：优先检查 Plan 状态（真实数据源）
 781 |         if self.plan_manager and hasattr(self.plan_manager, 'is_plan_complete'):
 782 |             if self.plan_manager.is_plan_complete():
 783 |                 # Plan 已全部完成，强制使用 "completed" 状态
 784 |                 task_status = "completed"
 785 |                 print(f"   [Phase 3] ✅ 检测到 Plan 已完成，状态同步为 completed")
 786 |             elif self.plan_manager.has_incomplete_tasks():
 787 |                 # Plan 还有未完成的步骤，强制使用 "in_progress"
 788 |                 task_status = "in_progress"
 789 |                 print(f"   [Phase 3] ⏳ Plan 尚未完成，状态保持 in_progress")
 790 |         else:
 791 |             # 没有 plan_manager，使用推断逻辑（备用）
 792 |             if errors_encountered:
 793 |                 unresolved_errors = [
 794 |                     e for e in errors_encountered
 795 |                     if not (e.get("resolved", False) if isinstance(e, dict) else e.resolved)
 796 |                 ]
 797 |                 if unresolved_errors:
 798 |                     task_status = "in_progress"
 799 |                 else:
 800 |                     task_status = "completed"
 801 |             else:
 802 |                 task_status = "completed"
 803 | 
 804 |         if compressed_state:
 805 |             summary_text = compressed_state.render_for_prompt()
 806 |             task_goal = compressed_state.task_goal or task_goal
 807 |             task_status = compressed_state.current_status
 808 |             key_decisions = compressed_state.key_decisions or key_decisions
 809 | 
 810 |         return SessionSummary(
 811 |             session_id=f"session_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}_{len(messages)}",
 812 |             timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
 813 |             summary_text=summary_text,
 814 |             task_goal=task_goal or f"压缩策略: {strategy.value}",
 815 |             task_status=task_status,  # 🔥 使用检测到的状态
 816 |             files_changed=files_changed[:10],  # 限制数量
 817 |             errors_encountered=errors_encountered[:5],
 818 |             tools_used=tools_used[:10],
 819 |             key_decisions=key_decisions if key_decisions else [f"使用{strategy.value}策略进行压缩"],
 820 |             importance=avg_importance,
 821 |             message_count=len(messages),
 822 |             token_count=sum(len(str(msg)) for msg in messages)
 823 |         )
 824 | 
 825 |     def _promote_compression_result(self, result: CompressionResult) -> List[MemoryItem]:
 826 |         """Promote reusable knowledge from CompressedSessionState into long-term MemoryItems."""
 827 |         if not self.promotion_enabled or not self.memory_manager or not result or not result.success:
 828 |             return []
 829 |         if not result.compressed_state:
 830 |             return []
 831 | 
 832 |         candidates = self._build_memory_promotion_candidates(result.compressed_state, result)
 833 |         promoted: List[MemoryItem] = []
 834 |         seen = self._existing_memory_signatures()
 835 |         for item in candidates:
 836 |             signature = self._memory_item_signat...
